heading: Authorization for verification of eligibility for State and local public benefits
label: 1625 Authorization for verification of eligibility for State and local public benefits
text: A State or political subdivision of a State is authorized to require an applicant for State and local public benefits (as defined in ) to provide proof of eligibility.section 1621(c) of this title
